screen_example.title: Welcome on The $t(common_appName.full)
screen_example.description: Do you want to discover some features? Just click on one of the three buttons at the bottom of the screen. The first allows you to call a REST API. The second lets you change the theme color. And the third allows you to change the language.

error_boundary.title: Oops! Something went wrong.
error_boundary.description: We are sorry for the inconvenience. Please try again later.

login.title: Welcome Back
login.subtitle: Sign in to access your wardrobe

errors.email_invalid: Please enter a valid email address
errors.password_too_short: Password must be at least 8 characters

screen_welcome.title: Welcome to Auxi
screen_welcome.subtitle: Get simple outfit suggestions that work for your day

welcome.headline:
Welcome to
Auxi
welcome.legal_text: By continuing, you agree to our Terms of Service and Privacy Policy
welcome.oauth_not_configured: Sign-in is not set up on this build yet.
welcome.oauth_generic_error: Couldn't sign in. Please try again.
welcome.oauth_conflict_other_provider: This email is linked to {{provider}}. Sign in with {{provider}} instead.
welcome.oauth_conflict_password: This email already has a password. Sign in with your password.
welcome.qa_bypass_error: QA bypass login failed. Check the backend on :5001.

email_input.label: What is your email
email_input.error_invalid: Please enter a valid email adress
email_input.error_no_account: No account found for this email. Please sign in or create one.
email_input.error_rate_limited: Too many attempts. Please try again later.

password_creation.error_weak_password: Your password is too weak. Meet all 3 criteria.
password_creation.error_email_exists: This email already has an account.
password_creation.error_generic: We couldn't create your account. Please try again.

verify_email.title: Verify your email
verify_email.body_line_a: We sent a verification email to
verify_email.body_line_c: Click the link in the email to verify account.
verify_email.resend_failure: Couldn't resend right now. Try again in a moment.
verify_email.status_waiting: Waiting for email to be verified

email_google_notice.headline: Google
email_google_notice.body: This email is linked to a Google account. Please sign in with Google instead

signin.error_email_not_verified: Please verify your email before signing in.
signin.error_oauth_account: This email uses {{provider}}. Sign in with {{provider}} instead.
signin.error_rate_limited: Too many attempts. Please try again later.
signin.error_generic: Something went wrong. Please try again.

forgot_request.body: We'll send a password reseting to your email
forgot_request.gmail_notice: This email uses Google. Reset your password in the Gmail app or your Google account settings.
forgot_request.error_rate_limited: Too many requests. Please try again later.
forgot_request.error_generic: Couldn't send reset email. Please try again.

forgot_check_mail.body_line_a: We've sent  a password reset link to:
forgot_check_mail.body_line_c: If you don't see the email, check your spam folder.

reset_new_password.error_token_expired: This reset link has expired. Request a new one.
reset_new_password.error_token_consumed: This reset link has already been used.
reset_new_password.error_weak_password: Your password is too weak. Meet all 3 criteria.
reset_new_password.error_generic: Couldn't reset your password. Please try again.

verified.headline: Verified!
verified.error_token_expired: This verification link has expired. Resend a new one.
verified.error_generic: We couldn't verify right now. Try again in a moment.

itemDetail.coming_soon_body: Anchor item recommendations will be enabled after the next backend update.
itemDetail.toast_load_failed_body: Please try again in a moment.
itemDetail.toast_delete_failed_body: We could not delete this item.
itemDetail.toast_save_failed_body: We could not save your changes.
itemDetail.toast_generic_update_failed: We could not update this item right now.
itemDetail.toast_catalog_delete_blocked: Common items can only be marked as Less Use

itemDetail.error_404: Item not found. It may have been removed already.
itemDetail.error_429: Too many requests. Please wait a moment and try again.

mood.title: How did this outfit feel?
mood.subtitle: This helps us understand your style and mood better.
mood.errorGeneric: Unable to save your feedback. Please try again.
mood.errorTimeout: Connection timed out. Please try again.
mood.savedBanner: This look is now saved to your favorites.
mood.moodUpdatedBanner: Mood updated for this saved look.

favourite.title: Favourite
favourite.empty_body: Tap "Wear this" button to add an outfit
favourite.remove_body: Are you sure to remove this outfit from your favourite list
favourite.load_error: We couldn't load your favourites. Please try again.

seeThisOnMe.title: Self visualization
seeThisOnMe.optIn: Use this photo for future outfit previews
seeThisOnMe.privacy: Your photos are always kept private
seeThisOnMe.error: We couldn't create your look. Please try again.

errors.noPerson: Please upload a photo of yourself showing your body, so we can show the outfit on you.
errors.upload: We couldn't check that photo. Please check your connection and try again.
errors.generate: We couldn't create your look. Please try again.

step1.prompt: 1/3 - Start with a selfie photo. No need to be perfect, you can change it later.

step2.prompt: 2/3 - Add a full-body photo. Optional, but it helps Macgie understand proportions and styling better.

step3.prompt: 3/3 - Choose the shape that feels most like you. Tap to expand
step3.expandedTitle: Choose the shape that feels most like you.
